reasons.detail: DXY at 120.9 — strong dollar pressuring gold
Real yield at 1.97% and falling — reduces gold's opportunity cost
VIX at 23.9 — elevated fear driving safe-haven flows into gold
GPR Index at 297 — extreme geopolitical risk, max safe-haven bid
Breakevens at 2.36% rising — inflation hedge demand

continuation: For continuation, gold needs to hold above $4657 and break $4667. Watch for USD weakness to accelerate the move. Risk: a VIX collapse below 18 would remove the safe-haven bid.
